summary: Merchant Withdrawal Dashboard Refactoring - Complete testing of new referral performance dashboard. Backend APIs (referral-stats, referral-link) working correctly. Frontend MerchantWithdrawal.jsx successfully refactored to show referral stats instead of manual withdrawal UI. All old withdrawal elements removed as required.

minor.note: Not related to current feature - existing issue
Not related to current feature - existing issue

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor rendering issue that doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ GET /api/merchants/referral-stats returns all required fields: total_referrals, total_earned, earnings_today, earnings_this_month, monthly_breakdown, recent_referrals
✅ GET /api/merchants/referral-link returns recruitment_qr_code, referral_link, share_messages for WhatsApp/SMS
✅ Merchant referral codes follow SDM-R-xxx pattern correctly
✅ Client registration in auth.py supports merchant referral codes (referred_by_merchant_id field)
✅ Commission processing in processing.py handles _process_merchant_referral_commission for GHS 3 per referral
✅ Frontend MerchantWithdrawal.jsx completely rewritten with referral performance dashboard
✅ All old manual withdrawal UI elements removed (amount input, quick buttons, balance cards)
✅ Auto-payout info banner displayed with MoMo/Bank destination
✅ French labels used throughout: 'Total gagné via parrainage', 'Nombre de filleuls', 'Aujourd'hui', 'Ce mois'
✅ Share referral section with copy code and share button functionality

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All new UI elements visible, all old elements removed

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - used existing test merchant
context_for_next_testing_agent: Merchant referral dashboard feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/merchants/referral-stats, GET /api/merchants/referral-link. Frontend: MerchantWithdrawal.jsx in Settings > Withdrawal tab now shows referral performance instead of manual withdrawal. Test merchant has recruitment_qr_code: SDM-R-8B12BE01. Commission is GHS 3 per referred client.

backend_apis: GET /api/merchants/referral-stats - Returns referral statistics with monthly breakdown
GET /api/merchants/referral-link - Returns referral link and QR code with share messages
Bonus per referral correctly set to GHS 3
frontend_new_elements: Auto-payout info banner with MoMo/Bank destination display
Total earned from referrals card (GHS amount)
Share referral section with code display
